name: laforza
description: DEADLINE — policy-bound agent wallets for football deals

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @laforza/domain && npm run build --workspace @laforza/protocol && npm run build --workspace @laforza/contracts && npm run build --workspace @laforza/backend && npm run build --workspace @laforza/frontend
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @laforza/domain && npm run test --workspace @laforza/protocol && npm run test --workspace @laforza/contracts && npm run test --workspace @laforza/backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @laforza/domain && npm run build --workspace @laforza/protocol && npm run typecheck --workspace @laforza/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace @laforza/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @laforza/frontend
